Our Specialty

Custom Engraving
On Everything

Every single product in our shop can be personalized. We engrave names, dates, monograms, and custom messages in-house — right here at our Guilford boutique — before your item ships or is ready for pickup.

Coffee Tumblers Hot/Cold Tumblers Cutting Boards Serving Boards Whiskey Sets Coaster Sets Keyrings

Simple Process

How It Works

01

Choose Your Item

Browse our products in store or submit a custom order request online with the item and personalization details you want.

02

We Engrave In-House

Our in-store engraving machine handles everything — names, dates, monograms, logos. Turnaround is typically 3–5 business days.

03

Pick Up or Ship

Collect your personalized item in store at 688 Boston Post Road, Guilford — or we can arrange shipping directly to you.

Made Just For You

Ready to Order?

Fill out our custom order form and we’ll reach out within 24 hours to confirm the details and get started on your personalized item.
